# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy-access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 8001

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address:
        protocol: TCP
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 15001
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          codec_type: AUTO
          stream_idle_timeout: 1m0s
          stats_prefix: my_service
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: my_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/api'
                route:
                  cluster: my_cluster
                  retry_policy:
                    num_retries: 3
                    per_try_timeout: 1s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router
            typed_config:
              '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_router.v2.HttpRouter

clusters:
- name: my_cluster
  connect_timeout: 5s
  type: STRICT_DNS
  lb_policy:
    tollerance: 0s
    policy: ROUND_ROBIN
  hosts:
  - socket_address:
      address: backend-service
      port_value: 80
